title: pelargonium × heteromallum
intro: Pelargonium × heteromallum, also known as Rose Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the family Geraniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of PMS and menopause. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve mood, and support overall well-being.
